violations.text: Raw animal foods such as shelled eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as deli turkey in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

Food contact surfaces of the slicer and ice machine were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer was cleaned and sanitized during time of inspection. Ice machine was taken out of service during time of inspection. Ice machine to be thoroughly cleaned and sanitized prior to use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025
Gaskets for Coca Cola cooler was observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

The floors in the kitchen area observed in poor repair. -The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Floors shall be smooth, durable, non-absorbent, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed outside in the back area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer) observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. -Staff washed, rinsed, and sanitized the can opener and slicer during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. The non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned as often as necessary to prevent buildup of residue. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2023

The floors in the kitchen area observed in poor repair. Holes/gaps in the storage area shall be sealed. The walls on the other end of kitchen are constructed with materials that are not smooth, durable, non-absorbent, and easily cleanable. -The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Walls/floors shall be smooth, durable, non-absorbent, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed outside in the back area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2023
